columns.name: EVENT_ID
columns.comment: Contract key - promoted from payload; NULLABLE so malformed records still land (schema-on-read: RAW keeps the full set, quarantine flags the bad ones)

columns.name: ACCOUNT_ID
columns.comment: Contract key - promoted from payload; nullable (see EVENT_ID)

columns.name: EVENT_TIMESTAMP
columns.comment: Contract key - event time; nullable (see EVENT_ID)

columns.name: PAYLOAD
columns.comment: Full event JSON - schema-on-read; new upstream fields land here with no DDL

columns.name: _LOADED_AT
columns.comment: Load time - dedup tiebreaker in staging
